texto: I know it isn't right to put the blame easily on anyone. But, won't you feel sad if you know that those people are the reasons of your misery? Those people whom you never expected to be like this. But still, i hope that someday i will say "thanks to you i didn't get there so i can be as great and successful as i am right now
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Amalia Azizah: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I know it isn't right to put the blame easily on anyone. But, won't you feel sad if you know that…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, life-lesson, right pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
